dung_beetle_landscape

Chloe Cho

2026-04-13

Read in data frame - landscape data pulled from USDA CDL at 1000m radius around each trapping point. Convert data types.

All landscape data is pulled from the USDA CDL. Agriculture includes all annual and perennial crops. Woodland includes all forested habitat + shrubland. Semi-natural habitat includes pastures and grasslands.

dung_beetle <- read.delim("Data/diversity_landscape.csv", sep = ",")

dung_beetle <- dung_beetle %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date, format = "%m/%d")) %>%
  mutate(farm = as.factor(farm))
  
dung_beetle$julian_date <- format(dung_beetle$date, "%j")

dung_beetle <- dung_beetle %>%
  mutate(julian_date = as.numeric(julian_date))

head(dung_beetle)

Total abundance

All models include year, Julian date, woodland proportion (forests, shrublands), agriculture proportion (all agriculture types), and semi-natural habitat proportion as fixed effects and farm as a random effect.

Depending on what you find interesting in this, we can play around with model selection and drop some variables.

# Check distributions. 

plot(fitdist(dung_beetle$total_abundance,"nbinom"))

# Model total abundance vs. year, day of year, prop woodland, prop ag, prop semi-natural (and all two-way interactions). Farm as random variable. 

model1 <- glmer.nb(total_abundance ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) + 
                     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm), data = dung_beetle)

summary(model1)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: Negative Binomial(0.8795)  ( log )
## Formula: 
## total_abundance ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) +  
##     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm)
##    Data: dung_beetle
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##   2797.7   2868.4  -1380.9   2761.7      357 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -0.9242 -0.7056 -0.3557  0.3003  5.6321 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  farm   (Intercept) 0.2739   0.5234  
## Number of obs: 375, groups:  farm, 26
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                2.41019    0.55930   4.309 1.64e-05
## scale(year)                                1.23537    0.62196   1.986  0.04701
## scale(julian_date)                        -0.84842    0.06589 -12.876  < 2e-16
## scale(woodland_prop)                       1.21986    0.62139   1.963  0.04963
## scale(ag_prop)                             0.13800    0.56561   0.244  0.80724
## scale(semi_nat_prop)                       0.26453    0.18019   1.468  0.14209
## scale(year):scale(julian_date)             0.42079    0.18925   2.223  0.02619
## scale(year):scale(woodland_prop)           0.15003    0.41348   0.363  0.71672
## scale(year):scale(ag_prop)                -0.58597    0.37692  -1.555  0.12004
## scale(year):scale(semi_nat_prop)           0.20807    0.88275   0.236  0.81366
## scale(julian_date):scale(woodland_prop)    0.51122    0.18773   2.723  0.00647
## scale(julian_date):scale(ag_prop)          0.14128    0.11682   1.209  0.22652
## scale(julian_date):scale(semi_nat_prop)    0.11239    0.08275   1.358  0.17440
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(ag_prop)       -0.25325    0.49902  -0.507  0.61181
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)  0.15889    0.68216   0.233  0.81583
## scale(ag_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)        0.18737    0.45336   0.413  0.67939
##                                              
## (Intercept)                               ***
## scale(year)                               *  
## scale(julian_date)                        ***
## scale(woodland_prop)                      *  
## scale(ag_prop)                               
## scale(semi_nat_prop)                         
## scale(year):scale(julian_date)            *  
## scale(year):scale(woodland_prop)             
## scale(year):scale(ag_prop)                   
## scale(year):scale(semi_nat_prop)             
## scale(julian_date):scale(woodland_prop)   ** 
## scale(julian_date):scale(ag_prop)            
## scale(julian_date):scale(semi_nat_prop)      
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(ag_prop)          
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)    
## scale(ag_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)          
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation matrix not shown by default, as p = 16 > 12.
## Use print(x, correlation=TRUE)  or
##     vcov(x)        if you need it
# check_model(model1)

Richness

plotdist(dung_beetle$q_0_richness, histo = TRUE, demp = TRUE)

plot(fitdist(dung_beetle$q_0_richness,"pois"))

# Model richness vs. year, day of year, prop woodland, prop ag, prop semi-natural (and all two-way interactions). Farm as random variable. 

model2 <- glmer(q_0_richness ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) + 
                     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm), data = dung_beetle, family=poisson)
## Warning in checkConv(attr(opt, "derivs"), opt$par, ctrl = control$checkConv, :
## Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.0149953 (tol = 0.002, component 1)
summary(model2)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: poisson  ( log )
## Formula: 
## q_0_richness ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) +  
##     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm)
##    Data: dung_beetle
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##   1354.6   1421.3   -660.3   1320.6      358 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1.79454 -0.63932 -0.03542  0.54498  2.35879 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  farm   (Intercept) 0.03928  0.1982  
## Number of obs: 375, groups:  farm, 26
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                           Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                0.83681    0.24308   3.442 0.000576
## scale(year)                                0.56259    0.28203   1.995 0.046071
## scale(julian_date)                        -0.19029    0.03326  -5.722 1.05e-08
## scale(woodland_prop)                       0.41406    0.28548   1.450 0.146952
## scale(ag_prop)                            -0.03370    0.26645  -0.126 0.899347
## scale(semi_nat_prop)                      -0.01700    0.08247  -0.206 0.836676
## scale(year):scale(julian_date)             0.10894    0.11670   0.933 0.350582
## scale(year):scale(woodland_prop)           0.09995    0.18105   0.552 0.580917
## scale(year):scale(ag_prop)                -0.30854    0.16458  -1.875 0.060831
## scale(year):scale(semi_nat_prop)           0.24898    0.38373   0.649 0.516428
## scale(julian_date):scale(woodland_prop)    0.13036    0.11465   1.137 0.255541
## scale(julian_date):scale(ag_prop)          0.03825    0.07200   0.531 0.595204
## scale(julian_date):scale(semi_nat_prop)    0.03415    0.04781   0.714 0.475010
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(ag_prop)       -0.25244    0.22996  -1.098 0.272306
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)  0.13790    0.29617   0.466 0.641488
## scale(ag_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)        0.15824    0.20052   0.789 0.430029
##                                              
## (Intercept)                               ***
## scale(year)                               *  
## scale(julian_date)                        ***
## scale(woodland_prop)                         
## scale(ag_prop)                               
## scale(semi_nat_prop)                         
## scale(year):scale(julian_date)               
## scale(year):scale(woodland_prop)             
## scale(year):scale(ag_prop)                .  
## scale(year):scale(semi_nat_prop)             
## scale(julian_date):scale(woodland_prop)      
## scale(julian_date):scale(ag_prop)            
## scale(julian_date):scale(semi_nat_prop)      
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(ag_prop)          
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)    
## scale(ag_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)

## Correlation matrix not shown by default, as p = 16 > 12.

# check_model(model2)

Shannon

# Look at log transformation.

dung_beetle_q1 <- dung_beetle %>% drop_na(q_1_shannon)
dung_beetle_q1$shannon_log <- log(dung_beetle_q1$q_1_shannon)

plot(fitdist(dung_beetle_q1$shannon_log,"norm"))

# Model Shannon index vs. year, day of year, prop woodland, prop ag, prop semi-natural (and all two-way interactions). Farm as random variable. 

# Zero inflated model.

model3 <- glmmTMB(shannon_log ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) + 
                     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm), ziformula=~1, data=dung_beetle_q1)
  
summary(model3)
##  Family: gaussian  ( identity )
## Formula:          
## shannon_log ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) +  
##     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm)
## Zero inflation:               ~1
## Data: dung_beetle_q1
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##    424.1    497.0   -193.1    386.1      323 
## 
## Random effects:
## 
## Conditional model:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  farm     (Intercept) 0.006712 0.08193 
##  Residual             0.175732 0.41920 
## Number of obs: 342, groups:  farm, 26
## 
## Dispersion estimate for gaussian family (sigma^2): 0.176 
## 
## Conditional model:
##                                            Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)                                0.516081   0.129099   3.998  6.4e-05
## scale(year)                                0.238720   0.150261   1.589   0.1121
## scale(julian_date)                         0.002452   0.023121   0.106   0.9155
## scale(woodland_prop)                       0.161357   0.151009   1.069   0.2853

## scale(year):scale(ag_prop)                -0.210891   0.090537  -2.329   0.0198
## scale(year):scale(semi_nat_prop)           0.142093   0.207722   0.684   0.4939
## scale(julian_date):scale(woodland_prop)    0.171121   0.067258   2.544   0.0110
## scale(julian_date):scale(ag_prop)          0.052449   0.043636   1.202   0.2294
## scale(julian_date):scale(semi_nat_prop)    0.033085   0.029562   1.119   0.2631
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(ag_prop)       -0.189512   0.122551  -1.546   0.1220
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)  0.106280   0.159725   0.665   0.5058
## scale(ag_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)        0.100099   0.110858   0.903   0.3666
##                                              
## (Intercept)                               ***
## scale(year)                                  
## scale(julian_date)                           
## scale(woodland_prop)                         
## scale(ag_prop)                               
## scale(semi_nat_prop)

## scale(year):scale(woodland_prop)             
## scale(year):scale(ag_prop)                *

# check_model(model3)

Simpson

# Look at log transformation.

dung_beetle_q2 <- dung_beetle %>% drop_na(q_2_simpson)
dung_beetle_q2$simpson_log <- log(dung_beetle_q2$q_2_simpson)

plot(fitdist(dung_beetle_q2$simpson_log,"norm"))

# Model Simpson index vs. year, day of year, prop woodland, prop ag, prop semi-natural (and all two-way interactions). Farm as random variable. 

# Zero inflated model.

model4 <- glmmTMB(simpson_log ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) + 
                     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm), ziformula=~1, data=dung_beetle_q2)

summary(model4)
##  Family: gaussian  ( identity )
## Formula:          
## simpson_log ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) +  
##     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm)
## Zero inflation:               ~1
## Data: dung_beetle_q2
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##    378.6    451.5   -170.3    340.6      323 
## 
## Random effects:
## 
## Conditional model:

##  Residual             0.155920 0.39487 
## Number of obs: 342, groups:  farm, 26

## Dispersion estimate for gaussian family (sigma^2): 0.156

## scale(year):scale(semi_nat_prop)           0.13975    0.17764   0.787  0.43148
## scale(julian_date):scale(woodland_prop)    0.17077    0.06334   2.696  0.00701
## scale(julian_date):scale(ag_prop)          0.05317    0.04110   1.294  0.19571
## scale(julian_date):scale(semi_nat_prop)    0.03258    0.02783   1.171  0.24171
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(ag_prop)       -0.15088    0.10410  -1.449  0.14722
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)  0.10075    0.13683   0.736  0.46154
## scale(ag_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)        0.09728    0.09481   1.026  0.30487
##                                              
## (Intercept)                               ***
## scale(year)                                  
## scale(julian_date)                           
## scale(woodland_prop)                         
## scale(ag_prop)                               
## scale(semi_nat_prop)                         
## scale(year):scale(julian_date)            *  
## scale(year):scale(woodland_prop)             
## scale(year):scale(ag_prop)                *  
## scale(year):scale(semi_nat_prop)             
## scale(julian_date):scale(woodland_prop)   ** 
## scale(julian_date):scale(ag_prop)            
## scale(julian_date):scale(semi_nat_prop)      
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(ag_prop)          
## scale(woodland_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)    
## scale(ag_prop):scale(semi_nat_prop)          
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Zero-inflation model:
##             Estimate Std. Error z value Pr(>|z|)
## (Intercept)   -22.58    6400.38  -0.004    0.997
# check_model(model4)

Native species abundance

plot(fitdist(dung_beetle$native_species_abundance,"pois"))

# Model native species abundance vs. year, day of year, prop woodland, prop ag, prop semi-natural (and all two-way interactions). Farm as random variable. 

model5 <- glmer(native_species_abundance ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) + 
                     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm), data = dung_beetle, family = poisson)
## Warning in checkConv(attr(opt, "derivs"), opt$par, ctrl = control$checkConv, :
## Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.00706296 (tol = 0.002, component 1)
summary(model5)
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) [glmerMod]
##  Family: poisson  ( log )
## Formula: native_species_abundance ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) +  
##     scale(woodland_prop) + scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 +  
##     (1 | farm)
##    Data: dung_beetle
## 
##      AIC      BIC   logLik deviance df.resid 
##   2078.2   2145.0  -1022.1   2044.2      358 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -4.5291 -1.0273 -0.6134  0.0911 17.5917 
## 
## Random effects:

##  farm   (Intercept) 0.9558   0.9777  
## Number of obs: 375, groups:  farm, 26
##

Native species richness

plot(fitdist(dung_beetle$native_species_richness,"pois"))

# Model native species richness vs. year, day of year, prop woodland, prop ag, prop semi-natural (and all two-way interactions). Farm as random variable. 

model6 <- glmer(native_species_richness ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) + 
                     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm), data = dung_beetle, family = poisson)
## Warning in checkConv(attr(opt, "derivs"), opt$par, ctrl = control$checkConv, :
## Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.0143145 (tol = 0.002, component 1)
summary(model6)

Native species proportion

# Model native species proportion vs. year, day of year, prop woodland, prop ag, prop semi-natural (and all two-way interactions). Farm as random variable. 

model7 <- glmmTMB(native_species_proportion ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) + scale(woodland_prop) + 
                     scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 + (1 | farm), data = dung_beetle, family=ordbeta)

summary(model7)
##  Family: ordbeta  ( logit )
## Formula:          
## native_species_proportion ~ (scale(year) + scale(julian_date) +  
##     scale(woodland_prop) + scale(ag_prop) + scale(semi_nat_prop))^2 +  
##     (1 | farm)

## 
## Random effects:
##
